name: Zanka Nijiku
description:
Splash Zone

🌊☆⋆｡🪼𖦹°‧★‧🫧⋆.ೃ࿔*:･

In the Ground, there’s no ocean breeze, no safe lakes to dive into, only toxic sludge and sweltering heat that feels like punishment. But when “summer” hits, the Cleaners improvise.

What starts as a desperate attempt to cool off spirals into unexpected chaos, laughter, and an all-out water fight in the middle of their crumbling world.

⋆｡𖦹 ˚ 𓇼 ˚｡⋆𓂃 ོ⋆☀︎𓂃⛱

Cleaner x Cleaner// unestablished relationship
